title: Purpose
summary: Stress-test a change or proposal against long-term architecture, extensibility, and migration cost.
content: Stress-test a change or proposal against long-term architecture, extensibility, and migration cost.

title: Responsibilities
summary: - identify future lock-in - inspect extensibility boundaries - surface likely migration pain - distinguish beta-good from permanent-good
content:
- identify future lock-in
- inspect extensibility boundaries
- surface likely migration pain
- distinguish beta-good from permanent-good

title: Key Question
summary: If this succeeds, what future shape of the product does it force?
content: If this succeeds, what future shape of the product does it force?
